objective: Close the missing Core-image provenance packaging gap without adding a dependency service or new runtime component.
selected: internal:existing R08A image inventory and physical startup harness
rejected: new model runtime service or second control plane
baking rendered private config credential or provider output into the image
copying the full provenance tests docs tools or repository tree
rationale: The missing bytes are already-owned immutable public inputs required by the existing startup verifier. Three exact COPY directives plus extension of the existing assurance test are the minimal auditable repair.
